overview: Graphic Era (Deemed to be University), located in Clement Town, Dehradun, Uttarakhand, is a premier private deemed-to-be university established in 1993 as the Graphic Era Institute of Technology (GEIT). The university is widely recognized for excellence in engineering, technology, computer applications, management, and applied sciences, with a strong focus on industry-oriented education, research, innovation, and placements.
accreditation: NAAC 'A+' accredited; Deemed to be University status granted by UGC, Ministry of Education, Government of India. Multiple engineering programs are accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA).

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹2,13,800 – ₹2,22,500 per semester (base tuition without scholarships). Merit scholarship-adjusted fee ranges between ₹1,25,000 – ₹1,90,000 per semester depending on academic performance and specialization.

placements.placementRate: B.Tech CSE & Allied Branches: ~80–90%; Other Technical & Professional Programs: ~75%
placements.companiesVisited: Google, Microsoft, Adobe, D.E. Shaw, Amazon, Visa, JP Morgan, Teradata, Infosys
placements.internationalOffers: Multiple high-value offers ranging between ₹30 LPA – ₹50 LPA during 2025-26 cycle

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on Class XII PCM marks, JEE Main percentile, CUET scores, and university-level counseling depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions generally follow the annual academic admission calendar released by the university.

campus.area: Modern urban campus located in Clement Town, Dehradun
campus.specialNote: Hostel & mess charges range between ₹62,500 – ₹95,000 per semester depending on room type and AC/non-AC configuration. Facilities include Wi-Fi, laundry services, and multi-cuisine mess facilities.

contact.address: Graphic Era (Deemed to be University), Bell Road, Clement Town, Dehradun – 248002, Uttarakhand, India

scholarships.academicMerit: Tuition fee waivers ranging from ₹15,000 – ₹75,000 per semester based on Class XII PCM scores, JEE Main percentile, or CUET scores.
scholarships.femaleScholarships: Additional fee concessions for female candidates in engineering and technical programs.
scholarships.stateDomicileBenefit: 26% tuition fee rebate for eligible Uttarakhand domicile students.
scholarships.governmentScholarships: NSP-linked scholarships available for SC, ST, and OBC category students.
